features.label: Offensive Rating Diff
features.description: Points scored per 100 possessions (home minus away). Higher = more efficient offense.
features.why: Best single measure of team offensive quality.

features.label: Defensive Rating Diff
features.description: Points allowed per 100 possessions (home minus away). Lower opponent score = better defense.
features.why: Defense wins championships — and games.

features.label: Effective FG% Diff
features.description: Accounts for the extra value of 3-pointers: (FGM + 0.5×3PM) / FGA.
features.why: Better shot quality than raw FG% — captures 3-point era efficiently.

features.label: True Shooting % Diff
features.description: Points per shooting attempt including free throws: PTS / (2 × (FGA + 0.44×FTA)).
features.why: Most complete measure of scoring efficiency.

features.label: Off Rebound % Diff
features.description: Percentage of available offensive rebounds a team collects.
features.why: Second-chance points create major scoring advantages.

features.label: Def Rebound % Diff
features.description: Percentage of available defensive rebounds a team collects.
features.why: Prevents opponent second chances.

features.label: Turnover Rate Diff
features.description: Turnovers per 100 possessions.
features.why: Turnovers directly gift the opponent easy scoring opportunities.

features.label: Free Throw Rate Diff
features.description: FTA / FGA — how often a team gets to the line.
features.why: Getting to the line is a sustainable scoring advantage.

features.label: 3-Point Rate Diff
features.description: 3PA / FGA — share of shots that are 3-pointers.
features.why: 3-point volume drives variance and scoring upside.

features.label: Last 10 Win % Diff
features.description: Win percentage over the last 10 games (home minus away).
features.why: Recent form better predicts performance than season average.

features.label: Last 10 Net Rating Diff
features.description: Net rating over last 10 games.
features.why: Rolling efficiency captures hot/cold streaks.

features.label: Last 10 PPG Diff
features.description: Average points scored over last 10 games.
features.why: Recent scoring output is a strong momentum signal.

features.label: Last 10 eFG% Diff
features.description: Effective FG% over the last 10 games.
features.why: Shooting trends matter more than season averages in-season.

features.label: Last 10 TOV Rate Diff
features.description: Turnover rate over the last 10 games.
features.why: Ball security is often a sign of team chemistry and coaching adjustments.

features.label: Days Rest Diff
features.description: Days since last game (home minus away). Positive = home team more rested.
features.why: Rest advantage is a proven predictor of game outcome.

features.label: Back-to-Back Diff
features.description: 1 if home team on B2B but away is not, -1 if opposite, 0 if same.
features.why: Playing on 0 days rest significantly impairs performance.

features.label: Games in Last 7 Days Diff
features.description: Number of games played in the last 7 days (home minus away).
features.why: Schedule compression leads to fatigue and injury risk.

features.label: Injury Impact Diff
features.description: % of team's season PPG currently injured or out (away minus home — positive = away team more hurt).
features.why: Injuries to key players are the biggest variable the model can't fully see.

features.label: Star Player Available Diff
features.description: Is the top scorer active? (1/0 differential).
features.why: Elite players have outsized win probability impact.

features.label: Top 3 Scorers PPG Diff
features.description: Combined PPG of the top 3 available scorers per team.
features.why: Offensive depth proxy — does the team have multiple reliable scorers?

features.label: Top 5 +/- Diff
features.description: Combined plus-minus of top 5 players by minutes (home minus away).
features.why: Best available proxy for lineup quality without needing lineup data.

features.label: Home Court
features.description: Always 1.0 for home team. Home teams win ~57% of NBA games.
features.why: The single most consistent advantage in basketball.

features.label: Elo Rating Diff
features.description: Difference in Elo ratings (home minus away). Updated after every settled game.
features.why: Elo captures long-run team quality better than win percentage.

features.label: Win % Diff
features.description: Season win percentage (home minus away).
features.why: Simple but powerful baseline measure of team quality.

features.label: Streak Diff
features.description: Current winning/losing streak (positive = win streak, negative = losing streak). Home minus away.
features.why: Teams on winning streaks often have momentum and confidence.

features.label: Season Progress
features.description: Games played / 82. Scales from 0 (start) to 1 (end of regular season).
features.why: Team quality estimates are more reliable later in the season.

features.label: Vegas Spread
features.description: Vegas point spread from home team's perspective (e.g., -4.5 = home favored by 4.5).
features.why: Markets aggregate enormous information — spread is the single strongest predictor.

features.label: Moneyline Implied Probability
features.description: Home team win probability implied by the moneyline odds.
features.why: Moneyline markets are even more efficient than spreads for win/loss prediction.

features.label: Over/Under
features.description: Total points line set by oddsmakers.
features.why: Game total reflects pace and offensive expectations.

features.label: Playoff Game
features.description: 1 if this is a playoff game, 0 for regular season.
features.why: Playoff games have different dynamics — home court advantage amplifies.

features.label: Series Game #
features.description: Which game of this playoff series (1–7). 0 for regular season.
features.why: Later games in a series carry more pressure and predictability shifts.

features.label: Series Lead Diff
features.description: Home team's series wins minus away team's series wins (-3 to +3). 0 for regular season.
features.why: Teams leading a series have a psychological and strategic edge.

features.label: Elimination Game
features.description: 1 if the home team faces elimination (away leads 3-0 to 3-2). 0 otherwise.
features.why: Teams playing to stay alive often perform differently than favorites.

features.label: Can Clinch
features.description: 1 if the home team can win the series with a win (leads 3-0 to 3-2). 0 otherwise.
features.why: Closing-out teams have momentum but can sometimes let up.

features.label: Series Avg Point Diff
features.description: Average point differential for the home team in this series so far. 0 for regular season.
features.why: Dominance in the series thus far is a strong predictor of the next game.

features.label: Series eFG% Diff
features.description: Average effective FG% differential for home team in this series. 0 for regular season.
features.why: Shooting edge in a series often persists due to defensive schemes.

features.label: Playoff Games Played Diff
features.description: Home team's total playoff games this season minus away team's. 0 for regular season.
features.why: Teams in longer series accumulate more fatigue than opponents with sweeps.

features.label: Rolling Playoff Win % Diff
features.description: Win % over last 5 playoff games (home minus away). 0 for regular season.
features.why: Playoff momentum — teams playing well recently often continue that form.
